title: Christmas Candle Holder Set of 3, White Red Gold Tea Light Candle Holders with Christmas Tree Snowman Santa Claus Pattern, Glass Tealight Holders for Party Winter Fireplace Table Decoration
features: Dimensions Ideal: Set of 3 Christmas tea light holders glass (7cm W x 8cm H). Perfect for tealights, small candles, floating candles & other decorations. These festive pieces are both decorative and practical, ideal for home decor

Festive Designs: This votive candle holder set features snowmen, Santa, cars, snowflakes and "Merry Christmas" text. The creative designs build a cheerful holiday atmosphere, blending classic and contemporary style

Premium Materials: This Christmas candle holder set is crafted from durable, thick glass that is heat-resistant and shatter-proof. The edges are precision-cut and polished for safe handling, ensuring secure placement for holiday candle

Elegant White & Gold: Adorn your Christmas with this glass candle holder, etched with festive designs. Its shimmering white and gold frosted finish creates a dreamy atmosphere, casting a warm glow for holiday gatherings

Versatile Use: This Christmas candle decoration is ideal for festive seasons, winter weddings, or adding holiday cheer to your home. It easily enhances tables, mantels, and makes a beautiful Christmas table centrepiece
